summary: Added permanent-unit-re-unavailable rule: if a unit with (permanent) faint status is subsequently marked UNAVAILABLE again, fire causal_incoherence. Caught gen9ou-2301944495 (unit_B permanent UNAVAILABLE → recover_in=0 UNAVAILABLE). Tested and rejected broader double-UNAVAILABLE rule (creates FPs on valid chains due to chain window missing intermediate AVAILABLE events).
key_finding: Double-UNAVAILABLE for permanent-only is safe. Broader double-UNAVAILABLE creates FPs.
